title: Big Birch Tree
description: This simple mod adds a large birch tree to both birch biomes.
body:
### Big Birch Tree Mod

**This simple mod adds a large birch tree to both birch biomes.**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/964431d261dca10f905c68fc94301a28487590e1.jpeg)


- The terrain around the tree is designed to blend naturally with the biome
- Bees and beehives can be found near the tree

The tree is also part of Tree Giant Mod

and also part of: Giant Natural Additions mod.


**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
